test_strategy_covers_all_types.detail: Test strategy covers unit (prompt-verification), integration (cross-module), backward compatibility, NFR, edge cases. E2E and performance not applicable (agent files are LLM prompts, not executable code).

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.detail: 86 test cases across 5 test files cover all 35 ACs, 7 FRs, 4 NFRs

traceability_matrix_complete.detail: 35/35 ACs mapped to test cases (100% coverage). All have Test_File and Test_Cases columns populated.

coverage_targets_defined.detail: 100% AC coverage, 100% FR coverage, 100% NFR coverage, 100% VR coverage targets documented

test_data_strategy_documented.detail: Prompt-verification testing uses agent files as test data. Strategy documented in test-strategy.md Section 2.

critical_paths_identified.detail: Critical path: Reviewer IC checks (8 categories), per-file loop protocol (Writer->Reviewer->Updater), Phase 16/08 scope adjustment, backward compatibility
